title: Saudia-Style Baguette Wrap
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make wrap filled with saudia spices, fluffy meat, and crispy baguette.

ingredients.name: Fluffy ground meat
ingredients.notes: Use a mixture of beef and lamb for an authentic saudia flavor

ingredients.name: Saudia spices
ingredients.notes: A blend of cumin, coriander, and cinnamon

ingredients.name: Baguette
ingredients.notes: Toasted and crispy for the perfect crunch

ingredients.name: Lettuce
ingredients.notes: Fresh and crunchy for added texture

ingredients.name: Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Juicy and ripe for a burst of flavor

instructions: 1. Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ground meat to the skillet, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
3. Once the meat is browned, add the saudia spices and stir to combine.
4. Reduce heat to medium and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Meanwhile, toast the baguette until crispy.
6. Spread a layer of the meat mixture onto the toasted baguette.
7. Add the lettuce, tomatoes, and wrap ingredients on top of the meat.
8. Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
